'''Michaud Industries''' was a [[Droid/Legends|droid]] component manufacturer that specialized in manipulative droid parts, such as heavy-duty [[Limb/Legends|arms]] and retractors. It also produced ship parts such as [[blaster radiator]]s.

==Behind the scenes==
Michaud Industries company shares its name with [[Collette Michaud]], who worked as Project Leader, Designer and Writer on the [[1998]] video game [[Star Wars: DroidWorks]]''.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Math: Jabba's Game Galaxy]]''
*''[[Star Wars: DroidWorks]]'' {{1st}}
